mano_cua.result_summary: SvelteLab要求Node>=18<19，当前Node 23通过--force安装后启动，但LoadingIndicator.svelte编译错误导致页面白屏无法加载任何路由
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Application completely unable to load due to critical compilation error in LoadingIndicator.svelte. Both localhost:5173/ and /repl show identical error overlay or blank page.
